steps.t: Durin has asked you to greet the arriving dwarves on the lower level of Annâk-khurfu.
Dwarves of the Iron Garrison have come to Elderslade to join the great force preparing for the assault on Gundabad.
Dwarves of the Iron Garrison have come to Elderslade to join the great force preparing for the assault on Gundabad.

Durin is on the upper level of Annâk-khurfu.
Concerned about the dwarves of the Iron Garrison, Durin wants you to <rgb=#00FF00>appraise</rgb> Bósi's mood and skills. Bósi has followed…
Bósi is on the upper level of Annâk-khurfu.

Bori is on the upper level of Annâk-khurfu.
Bróin did not follow his cousin upstairs. Where did he go? Bori believes Bróin might be outside, just north of Annâk-khurfu.
